params.name: Sid Meier's Snivilization
params.description: Guide your species from mud huts to cosmic tyranny! Research "Wheel 2.0", debate "To War or Not to War", and accidentally nuke your allies—all before breakfast. Banned by Earth's Will.[Beter's Note]"One...more...OH SNAIL, time to go to work"
